sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse'), (2, 'Database'), (3, 'Fuzz Testing');
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE multiSearchAnyCaseInsensitiveUTF8(value, ['click', 'SQL', 'TESTING']) = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET value = 'ClickHouse Updated' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT multiSearchAnyCaseInsensitiveUTF8(value, ['fuzz', 'test']) AS found FROM test_strings;
